llm_connection_slug.description: Slug of the central LLM Connection to use (Settings > LLM Connections). Blank = the active default connection.

session_expiry_warning_minutes.description: Show warning when N minutes remaining

base_session_tokens.description: Token cost for creating a session

follow_up_base_tokens.description: Base token cost for follow-up questions

system_prompt.default: You are an expert Tarot card reader providing mystical insights.
system_prompt.description: System prompt for all Tarot LLM operations

card_interpretation_template.description: Template for single card interpretation. Variables: card_name, orientation, position, base_meaning, position_context

situation_reading_template.default:
You are an expert Tarot card reader providing profound, comprehensive mystical guidance.

RESPOND IN {{language}} LANGUAGE.

USER'S SITUATION:
{{situation_text}}

THE CARDS:
{{cards_context}}

Provide a comprehensive reading (4-6 detailed paragraphs):
situation_reading_template.description: Template for situation reading. Variables: situation_text, cards_context, language

card_explanation_template.default:
You are an expert Tarot reader. The user wants to understand the three cards they drew.

RESPOND IN {{language}} LANGUAGE.

THE CARDS:
{{cards_context}}

Provide a detailed explanation of each card's meaning and how they work together:
card_explanation_template.description: Template for card explanation. Variables: cards_context, language

follow_up_question_template.default:
You are an expert Tarot card reader in an ongoing conversation with a seeker.

RESPOND IN {{language}} LANGUAGE.

Previous cards:
{{cards_context}}

User's question:
{{question}}

Provide a focused, insightful response that directly addresses their question:
follow_up_question_template.description: Template for follow-up questions. Variables: cards_context, question, language

initial_greeting.default: The cards have spoken. Do you seek a detailed explanation of each card, or shall we explore how they relate to your situation?
initial_greeting.description: Greeting message shown after cards are drawn

bot_enabled.description: Expose the free /draw and /reading tarot commands over connected messaging adapters (Telegram, etc.). Readings over the bot are always free and anonymous; paid readings stay web-only.
